name: agentic-digital-twin
description: Build engineering digital twins as code with AI agents: one source-of-truth design.json mirrored into the build, every requirement gets an executable scored audit (PASS/WARN/FAIL), uv PEP723 scripts, rerun visualization (toward live data-fusion, closed-loop twins), the assembly verification ladder, scored tradeoff studies with sensitivity, a tiered FEA stack (analytic -> in-house beam FEA -> gmsh + CalculiX continuum) validated anchor-to-anchor, and the automation-agent manufacturability loop. Digital twin engineering and digital twin simulation, hardware-in-the-loop ready. Ships scaffolders, an audit/tradeoff/FEA/packaging skill set, a methodology subagent, and a living guardrails checklist.
